live.title: Norway vs Switzerland - 31 Mar 2026
live.shortDescription: Norway and Switzerland meet in an intriguing international friendly that brings together two sides known for physical presence, tactical discipline, and attacking quality. Norway will look to impose themselves through intensity and direct play, while Switzerland aim to control the tempo with structured buildup and midfield balance. Tune in to catch all the action from the UEFA International Friendlies as Norway and Switzerland, LIVE only on Sony LIV.
